articles.content:
ASUS's first DDR5 memory modules, the ROG 20th Edition, have been demoed on the ROG Crosshair X870E APEX motherboard, showcasing impressive OC capabilities.

articles.title: Research repository ArXiv will ban authors for a year if they let AI do all the work - TechCrunch
articles.description: ArXiv is doing more to crack down on the careless use of large language models in scientific papers.
articles.content:

articles.title: Scientists Find Evidence Earth Is Drifting Through the Ashes of an Exploded Star - SciTechDaily
articles.description: Earth is flying through the radioactive ashes of an ancient exploded star, and Antarctic ice preserved the evidence.
